description: Cycle orchestration: successful inbound advances cursor to fetch time; inbound applier failure leaves cursor_before in place.
Cycle orchestration: fetchChanges is called with last cursor_after minus the 5-minute overlap window.
Cycle orchestration: outbound op failure increments attempts and retries next cycle; at the cap the op becomes skipped and an exception is filed; cursor still advances.
Cycle orchestration: hard auth failure aborts before CDC — no fetch, no cursor change, connection marked expired, immediate notification sent.
Ops queue: enqueueing the same entity+operation while one is pending dedupes to a single op; a done op allows re-enqueue.
Scheduling: OAuth connect registers the cycle job (15-min, singleton per tenant×realm), disconnect deregisters, startup re-registers for connected tenants; interval is not coerced to 24h.
Cycle guard: CE edition or disconnected tenant → cycle exits as a no-op without error or cursor write.
Payment applier: single full payment → invoice_payments row (method quickbooks), payment transaction with qbo_payment_id metadata, invoice status 'paid'.
Payment applier: partial allocation → status 'partially_applied'; second payment completing the balance → 'paid'.
Payment applier: one QBO payment allocated across two mapped invoices applies per-allocation amounts to each.
Idempotency: re-delivering an already-mapped, unchanged payment (overlap window duplicate) is a no-op — no duplicate invoice_payments or transactions.
Payment edit: moved sync token reverses prior application and reapplies current allocations; net invoice_payments/transactions/status reflect only the edited amounts.
Payment delete: CDC-deleted payment writes payment_reversal transactions and recomputes status back to sent/partially_applied.
Payment exceptions: allocation to an unmapped QBO invoice files accounting_sync_unmapped_payment and applies nothing; currency mismatch likewise.
Stats-only inputs: unapplied remainder and RefundReceipt increment cycle stats without creating records.
Stripe regression: existing PaymentService/webhook tests pass unchanged after the recordExternalPayment extraction.
Customer applier: QBO rename refreshes mapping display name; deleted/inactive mapped customer files an exception.
Drift comparator: total change → drift with both versions in the exception; balance-only change → no drift; doc-number change → drift.
Drift resolutions: re-export sparse-updates QBO (mocked), refreshes snapshot, clears drift and closes the task; accept refreshes snapshot without touching the Alga invoice.
QBO-side void of a mapped invoice → external-voided mapping state + drift exception; status read action reports Voided.
Auto-export producer: finalize with auto-sync on + connected realm enqueues export_invoice; off, CE, or disconnected → no-op.
Outbound drain: pending export ops grouped into one batch with origin 'scheduled'; delivered ops marked done, failed ops carry the batch error.
Scheduled-batch validation failure (missing item mapping) files accounting_sync_export_error and fails the op.
Manual batch creation marks matching pending export ops done (no double export).
Exception dedupe: a second occurrence for the same entity+type updates the open task's context; resolving allows a fresh task next occurrence.
Token countdown: crossing 14/7/2-day thresholds notifies once per threshold; repeated cycles inside a threshold don't re-notify.
Cycle summary notification fires only on cycles that produced new exceptions.
Status aggregation: mapping+ops permutations produce Not synced / Queued / Synced / Drift / Error / Voided correctly (table-driven).
UI contract: InvoiceSyncBadge renders each state with tooltip content (doc number, last synced, deep link present).
UI contract: settings health panel renders cycle summary, counts with inbox links, token countdown; auto-sync toggle persists via the setting action.
Sync-now action is EE + billing_settings gated and triggers a cycle (mocked runner).

DB-backed integration: seeded tenant with one exported invoice; mocked QBO returns CDC payment + invoice edit; one cycle → invoice paid, drift exception filed, queued invoice exported in a scheduled batch, cursor advanced, cycle stats recorded.
Migrations up/down clean for accounting_sync_cycles, accounting_sync_operations, batches.origin, task definitions.
Sandbox: connect, finalize an invoice with auto-sync on → appears in QBO within one cycle; badge flips Queued → Synced with working deep link.
Sandbox: receive payment in QBO → Alga invoice flips to paid within one cycle; portal shows paid.
Sandbox: edit the QBO payment amount → Alga follows (partially_applied); delete the payment → reversal, invoice back to sent.
Sandbox: edit an exported invoice's amount in QBO → drift exception appears in inbox; re-export resolution restores QBO and clears the badge.
Sandbox: record a payment against a QBO-only invoice → unmapped-payment exception with usable context.
Sandbox: force token expiry (tamper stored credential) → connection-expired notification + health panel shows expired; reconnect restores cycles.
Sandbox: Sync Now from settings and from invoice detail both produce an immediate cycle; health panel reflects the run.
Regression sanity: client-portal Stripe payment still lands correctly (invoice paid, transaction written) after the recordExternalPayment refactor.
